meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scaling Student Projects (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop hitting walls in your student projects. Learn advanced debugging with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your development workflow efficiently.
content.answer_block: To scale student projects, stop manual debugging. Leverage AI-driven static analysis via Antigravity to identify architectural bottlenecks and use Claude Code to refactor technical debt in real-time. By automating the triage of complex logic errors, you transition from 'fixing bugs' to 'architecting scalable systems' in minutes instead of hours.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen filled with red text, the cursor blinking in a rhythm that feels like a countdown to failure. You started this project with ambition, but now the codebase has turned into a fragile house of cards. Every new feature breaks two old ones, and the complexity is suffocating your progress. This is the 'scaling wall'—the moment most students abandon their dreams of a production-ready portfolio.

But what if you didn't have to navigate this complexity alone? The era of the solo developer struggling in silence is over. By integrating AI-assisted debugging workflows, you transform your IDE into a senior engineering pair-programmer. It is time to stop being a victim of your own code and start mastering the systems that make senior engineers unstoppable.

steps.title: Architectural Bottleneck Identification
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, identify why your code fails to scale. Use AI to map out high-coupling areas that cause cascading failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for high-coupling modules that violate the Single Responsibility Principle and suggest a refactoring roadmap for better scalability.

steps.title: Automated Technical Debt Triage
steps.description: Clean up the mess that prevents new features. Use AI to prioritize which technical debt is currently blocking your scaling efforts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan for technical debt and list the top 3 issues that are actively preventing this project from handling increased data loads or user concurrency.

steps.title: Predictive Bug Surface Analysis
steps.description: Find bugs before they happen by analyzing edge cases in your logic flows that trigger during high-load scenarios.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify potential race conditions or memory leaks in the current asynchronous implementation that could crash the system under heavy load.

steps.title: Refactoring for Modularity
steps.description: Transform monolithic functions into modular components to ensure the code remains maintainable as the project grows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current monolithic controller into modular service classes while maintaining existing interface contracts.

steps.title: Performance Regression Testing
steps.description: Verify that your fixes haven't introduced new bottlenecks by running automated performance benchmarks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of integration tests that specifically target the performance of the newly refactored service modules.

pro_tips: Treat your AI as a junior dev: Always provide context on your expected system load to get more relevant architectural advice.
Use 'Chain of Thought' prompting in Antigravity to force the AI to explain its reasoning before proposing code changes.
Never accept an AI refactor without asking for a 'Before vs After' performance impact summary.
Map your project dependencies visually using AI tools before starting a major refactor to avoid breaking hidden connections.
Automate your debugging loop by creating a custom Claude Code alias that runs your linting and AI analysis in one command.
content.next_steps: Once your codebase is stable, deploy your project to a staging environment and run a load test to validate your scaling improvements.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the tools to transform a chaotic project into a professional-grade application. Don't let your code hold you back from showing the world what you can build. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
